zh.lifeSummary: 當Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie於大約0995年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Godefroid Ier de Verdun61歲，母親Mathilde Billung von Sachsen55歲。他於1012年與Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1022年1月6日在法國奧其坦尼阿利艾維爾頓享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie于大约0995年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Godefroid Ier de Verdun61岁，母亲Mathilde Billung von Sachsen55岁。他于1012年与Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1022年1月6日在法国奧其坦尼阿利艾維爾頓享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Frédéric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie was born about 0995, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, was 61 and his mother, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, was 55. He married Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen in 1012. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 6 January 1022, in Verdun, Ariège, Occitanie, France, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie est né environ 0995, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, avait 55 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen en 1012. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1022, à Verdun, Ariège, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie um 0995 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godefroid Ier de Verdun 61 und seine Mutter Mathilde Billung von Sachsen 55. Er hat 1012 Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Januar 1022 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Verdun, Ariège, Occitanie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie è nato il circa 0995 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, aveva 55 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen nel 1012. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 gennaio 1022, nel Verdun, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingieが約0995年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Godefroid Ier de Verdunは61歳，母Mathilde Billung von Sachsenは55歳であった。1012年にMathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1022年1月6日にフランスオクシタニーアリeッジバーダンで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie(이)가 대략 0995년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godefroid Ier de Verdun(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde Billung von Sachsen(은)는 55세였다. 그는 1012년 Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1022년 1월 6일 프랑스 옥시탠이 애리e지 베르던에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie nasceu aproximadamente 0995, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, tinha 55 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen em 1012. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1022, em Verdun, Ariège, Occitanie, França, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie родился около 0995 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Godefroid Ier de Verdun было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, 55. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen в 1012 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 января 1022 г. в местности вирдун, ариeдж, окситани, Франция в возрасте 28 лет.

sm.1000--1021: mai le 1000 e o'o I le 1021

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie nació aproximadamente 0995, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Godefroid Ier de Verdun, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Mathilde Billung von Sachsen, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen en 1012. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de enero de 1022, en Verdun, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 28 años.
